user_commands.welcome_default: 👋 Welcome! Send me a message and I'll forward it to the admin.

admin_commands.cmd_tag: • /tag [label] — Tag user (in topic or by ID)
admin_commands.cmd_note: • /note [text] — Pin a note in current topic

wallet.no_wallet: ❌ No wallet connected. Connect your Stellar wallet to unlock advanced features.
wallet.prompt_address: 💳 Add Stellar Wallet Please send your Stellar public address (starts with G):
wallet.prompt_label: ✅ Address accepted! What would you like to name this wallet? (Examples: Main, Savings, Trading)
wallet.limit_reached: ❌ Limit reached. You can only have {max_wallets} wallets.
wallet.verify_no_wallet: ⚠️ No verification wallet configured by admin.
wallet.verify_method_prompt: Verification for {label} How would you like to verify this wallet?
wallet.verify_memo_instructions: 📝 Memo Verification Please send exactly 0.0000001 XLM to: {verify_addr} Memo (TEXT): {challenge} ⏰ Expires in 15 minutes.
wallet.verify_key_prompt: ⚠️ SECURITY WARNING You are about to send your secret key. It will be encrypted and stored safely. Send your secret key or /cancel.
wallet.verify_key_success: ✅ Verified successfully! Your secret key is stored encrypted.
wallet.verify_key_fail: ❌ Key does not match wallet address.
wallet.verified_memo: ✅ Wallet verified! Your wallet has been verified via memo payment.

relay.closed: 📁 This conversation has been closed by the admins.
